# Prerequisites

- [Yii goal and values](https://yiisoft.github.io/docs/internals/001-yii-values.html)
- [Namespaces](https://yiisoft.github.io/docs/internals/004-namespaces.html)
- [Git commit messages](https://yiisoft.github.io/docs/internals/006-git-commit-messages.html)
- [Exceptions](https://yiisoft.github.io/docs/internals/007-exceptions.html)
- [Interfaces](https://yiisoft.github.io/docs/internals/008-interfaces.html)

# Getting started

Since Yii 3 consists of many packages, we have a [special development tool](https://yiisoft.github.io/docs/internals/005-development-tool.html).

1. [Clone the repository](https://github.com/yiisoft/yii-dev-tool).

2. [Set up your own fork](https://github.com/yiisoft/yii-dev-tool#using-your-own-fork).

3. Now you are ready. Fork any package listed in `packages.php` and do `./yii-dev install username/package`.

If you don't have any particular package in mind to start with:

- [Check roadmap](https://yiisoft.github.io/docs/internals/003-roadmap.html).
- Check package issues at github. Usually there are some.
- Ask @samdark.
